title: turraea rutilans
intro: Turraea rutilans, commonly known as the African cherry or red turraea, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Turraea rutilans include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Turraea rutilans can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or decoction, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
